player_notes.luka doncic: Doncic served a suspension vs. the Wizards on Monday (LeBron triple-double in his absence). Monitor official injury/suspension report — if suspension carries over, he is OUT vs. Cleveland tonight.
player_notes.anthony edwards: Returned from a 6-game absence Monday, came off the bench (17 pts). Likely on a minutes restriction or eased back into rotation — temper counting stat ceilings.
player_notes.jaden mcdaniels: Week-to-week with knee injuries. Out indefinitely — role/minutes shift for MIN perimeter players.

game_notes.LAL vs CLE: Luka Doncic was suspended Monday vs. Washington — confirm whether suspension extends to tonight's LAL-CLE game. If out, elevated usage for LeBron, Reaves, and others.
game_notes.MIN vs DAL: Jaden McDaniels (knee) is week-to-week and out. Anthony Edwards returned Monday but off the bench with likely minutes limits — monitor his status for next game.
